top_signals.title: Treasury yields rise with 30-year rate touching levels not seen since 2023
top_signals.summary: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Labour selects Burnham and Reform UK picks plumber for by-election battle
top_signals.summary: Both Labour and Reform UK have announced their candidates for the upcoming by-election in Makerfield, with the Manchester mayor set to go up against a plumber who narrowly lost in 2024.  The Labour Party announced that local members accepted Burnham as its candidate, hours after the so-called ‘King in the North’ published a campaign video [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
